ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the individual */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the individual */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the address belongs to */,
  "street_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the address */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the address */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb of the address */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postcode of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., residential, mailing, work) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_details" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the contact record belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method of the individual (e.g., phone, email, mail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_details_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identity_verification" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the verification record belongs to */,
  "soc_sec_id" INTEGER /* Social security ID of the individual */,
  "blocking_number" INTEGER /* Blocking number for identity verification */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the individual */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver license number of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identity_verification_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "individual_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first individual in the relationship */,
  "individual_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second individual in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, spouse, friend) */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "relationship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationship_individual_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_1") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationship_individual_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_2") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID, passport, birth certificate) */,
  "document_number" TEXT /* Document number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Issue date of the document */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the audit record belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the system user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the system user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the system user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the system user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system user who accessed the record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., regex, length) */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message to display if validation fails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
